title: LEGO Star Wars: The Han Solo Affair
content:
{{Top|rwm|ncl|reb|italics=1}} {{Noncanon|real=1}} {{Movie |image=[[File:HanSoloAffair.jpg]] |title=''LEGO Star Wars: The Han Solo Affair'' |director=*[[Tony Mines]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.brickfilms.com/films/965|text=Star Wars Episode V 1/2: The Han Solo Affair|archivedate=20070706131018}} *[[Tim Drage]] |producer= |production company= |writer=*Tony Mines *[[Tim Drage]] |starring= |music=Jason Graves |release date=[[2002]]{{LEGOYouTube|7NwbK_AQ-rQ|Han Solo Story - Lego Star Wars - Mini Movie}} |runtime=3 minutes |budget= |language=English{{LEGOWeb|url=starwars/hansolo.asp|text=LEGO.com Star Wars Han Solo Affair|nolive=1}} |timeline=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''LEGO Star Wars: The Han Solo Affair'' is based on [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''LEGO Star Wars: The Han Solo Affair''''', also known as '''''Star Wars Episode V½''''', is a short stop-motion animated film using LEGO characters that was released in [[2002]]. It was created by [[Wikipedia:Spite Your Face Productions|Spite Your Face Productions Ltd]] and hosted on LEGO.com. It was also shared on Brickfilms.com and later posted to video streaming sites such as YouTube.com by Spite Your Face Productions. ==Publisher's summary== ''From between the scenes of ''The Empire Strikes Back'', it's the ''Han Solo Affair''!'' ''Han Solo's friends hatch a plan to rescue him from the clutches of Darth Vader and Boba Fett''. ''Will they succeed? Find out in this wacky ''Star Wars'' adventure!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=EPISODE V½
THE HAN SOLO AFFAIR |text=It is a time of crisis for the Rebel Alliance. On Cloud City, high above the planet Bespin, Han Solo has been captured by Darth Vader's Imperial forces and frozen in carbonite. As bounty hunter Boba Fett prepares to deliver the pirate to Jabba the Hutt, the Rebels hatch a desperate plan to save their friend…}} ==Plot summary== [[File:FettBespin.jpg|thumb|right|230px|Boba Fett in ''Slave I'']] As Han Solo is frozen in carbonite, his friends [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] look on in dismay. [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] uses an energy blast on the ceiling to make sparks rain down. A madcap chase around [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] ensues, with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and Darth Vader joining in. Eventually, Han ends up being tractored in by Fett, who then escapes in ''[[Slave I/Legends|Slave I]]'', with all the other characters fainting in disbelief.''LEGO Star Wars: The Han Solo Affair''
